message:
Add validate and fanout commands

- validate: parses story card and reports errors as JSON
- fanout: builds LLM prompt from story card, generates variation scenarios
- Wire both commands into CLI dispatcher (index.ts)
- 5 new tests (3 validate, 2 fanout prompt builder)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
